title: lepidium basuticum
intro: Lepidium basuticum, also known as mountain pepper, is a plant species in the Brassicaceae family, characterized by its peppery flavor and medicinal properties. Traditionally, the plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lepidium basuticum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and its seeds and leaves can also be used in various herbal preparations, such as tinctures and salves.
